author: Jeremy Hubble, Stanford University, gp-help@broad.mit.edu
plan:
## GctToPcl GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
GctToPcl is a GenePattern module that Convert .gct to .pcl

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: input.filename, output.filename
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<perl> <libdir>gctToPcl.pl -o <output.filename> <input.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: output.filename
parameters.description: PCL file that will be produced
